Tests the Math.atan2 function with negative infinity arguments.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It checks that when both arguments to `Math.atan2` are `-Infinity`, the result is `-3*Math.PI / 4`. This test ensures that the function correctly handles edge cases involving negative infinite values, which is important for mathematical accuracy in trigonometric calculations. The code is a single assertion and provides narrow functionality focused on validating a specific mathematical operation.
